### Post by Alathan on 2010-03-24
When I first installed that and was trying to run the program from the wine listing in the menu it spit that back out at me.  However when I tried running the auto launcher from the disk it spat a graphics error back but I'm other wise able to use it with no other real complaints.
Also I have been using the new version wine and playonline with setting the fable.exe and the splash.exe in windows xp compatibility mode seemed to provide the best settings.
